final:
module RefModule(input D, input C, input reset, input set, output reg Q);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge C or posedge reset or posedge set or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      Q <= 0;
    end else if (set) begin
      Q <= 1;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;
    end
  end
endmodule
